{
  "claims": [
    "AB 510 would provide funding to the Wildlife Conservation Board for land purchases related to the West Coyote Hills Open Space Project.",
    "North Orange County has 1 acre of parkland per 246 people, while South Orange County has 1 acre per 6 people.",
    "The National Recreation and Parks Association standard for parkland is 1 acre per 100 people.",
    "Within 7 miles of West Coyote Hills, there is 1 acre of parkland per 356 people.",
    "West Coyote Hills will serve as a biodiversity hotspot that supports plant and animal habitats."
  ]
}
